creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
Cannot install deskutils/xfce4-notification-daemon from ports, going back several versions. Always have to use the package. Tried installing with all possible `make config` combinations, no change. This is the only port out of 500 that fails. Nothing interesting in /etc/make.conf, problem also exists with an empty one. All ports are up-to-date as of today.
